title: Guajava oerstediana
taxonomy: Guajava oerstediana is classified within the genus Guavas, which is part of the Myrtaceae family. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the myrtle family. Guavas are native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and are widely cultivated for their fruit. Guajava oerstediana is a species of guava that is native to Central America. It is closely related to other species of guavas, such as Guavas guavas and Guavas cuneifolia.
